tag.name: cHTML - Printerest - Event - Add To Cart

parameter.value:
<script>
 var group_id = {{dlv - eventModel.items.0.item_id}};
  pintrk('track', 'AddToCart', {
    currency: {{dlv - eventModel.currency}},
    line_items:  [{
       product_category: {{dlv - eventModel.items.0.item_category}},
       product_id: {{dlv - eventModel.items.0.item_id}},
       product_variant_id: group_id.split('-')[0],
       product_price: {{dlv - eventModel.value}},
       product_quantity: {{dlv - eventModel.items.0.quantity}}
     }
   ]
 });
</script>

<script>
    var array_value_objects = {{dlv - eventModel.items[]}}
    var array_ready_objects = []
    var count_objects = 0

    for (var i = 0; i < array_value_objects.length; i++) {
        var contents_format = {}
        var group_id = array_value_objects[i].item_id
        contents_format.product_category = array_value_objects[i].item_category  //category
        contents_format.product_id = array_value_objects[i].item_id              //id
        contents_format.product_variant_id = group_id.split('-')[0]
        contents_format.product_price = array_value_objects[i].price             //price
        contents_format.product_quantity = array_value_objects[i].quantity  //quantity
        count_objects += array_value_objects[i].quantity
        array_ready_objects.push(contents_format)
    };
</script>
<script>
 pintrk('track', 'checkout', {
   order_id: {{dlv - eventModel.transaction_id}},
   value: {{dlv - eventModel.value}},
   currency: {{dlv - eventModel.currency}},
   line_items: array_ready_objects,
   order_quantity: count_objects
 });
</script>

        contents_format.product_price = array_value_objects[i].price             //price

        array_ready_objects.push(contents_format)
    };
</script>
<script>
pintrk('track', 'viewcategory', {
   search_query: {{dlv - eventModel.item_list_name}},
   line_items: array_ready_objects
 })
</script>

<!-- Pinterest Pixel Base Code -->
 <script type="text/javascript">
   !function(e){
     if(!window.pintrk){
       window.pintrk=function(){
         window.pintrk.queue.push(
         Array.prototype.slice.call(arguments))};var
         n=window.pintrk;n.queue=[],n.version="3.0";var
         t=document.createElement("script");t.async=!0,t.src=e;var
         r=document.getElementsByTagName("script")[0];r.parentNode.insertBefore(t,r)
       }
     }("https://s.pinimg.com/ct/core.js");
   pintrk('load', {{ID - Pinterest}}, {
     em: {{user_data.sha256_email_address}},
     'external_id': {{user_data.sha256_email_address}},
   });
   pintrk('page');
   pintrk('track', 'PageVisit');
</script>
 <!-- End Pinterest Pixel Base Code -->
